title: anisodontea scabrosa
intro: Anisodontea scabrosa, also known as the rough hibiscus or rough mallow, is a flowering plant species in the family Malvaceae, native to southern Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Anisodontea scabrosa include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Anisodontea scabrosa is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations can be used externally as a poultice or cream, or taken internally as a tea or tincture.
